scripts.build-alt: mkdir -p dist/wasm/src && npm run build-wasm && node ../../prebuild.mjs skipwasm-std skipwasm-json && tsc --outDir ../skipper/wasm/ && cp dist/src/libskipruntime.wasm ../skipper/wasm/src
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build-wasm
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist tsconfig.tsbuildinfo skipwasm-std skipwasm-json && npm run clean-alt
